transcript: Speaker A: भैया आप दिन का कितना कमा लेते हो? [Brother, how much do you earn in a day?] Speaker B: After selling all this, it will be around 10,000. Speaker A: वाह, तब महीने का कितना... 3 लाख? [Wow, then how much in a month... 3 lakhs?] Speaker B: Well, not exactly, but I do good for myself. Speaker A: आपकी इंग्लिश तो बहुत अच्छी है! यूट्यूब देख के सीखी क्या? [Your English is very good! Did you learn it by watching YouTube?] Speaker B: नहीं, इंग्लिश सीखने के लिए प्रैक्टिस करनी होती है, यूट्यूब पे प्रैक्टिस कैसे करूँगा? [No, to learn English you need to practice, how will I practice on YouTube?] Speaker A: हाँ, बात तो सही है। फिर कहाँ से सीखी? [Yes, that's true. Then where did you learn it from?] Speaker B: एक ऐप है MySivi करके, उसमें एक AI टीचर है जिसके साथ मैं प्रैक्टिस करके इंग्लिश सीखता हूँ। [There is an app called MySivi, it has an AI teacher with whom I practice and learn English.] Speaker A: ओ अच्छा, पर ये ऐप तो महँगा होगा ना? [Oh okay, but this app must be expensive, right?] Speaker B: बिल्कुल नहीं, मैंने बस ₹1 में शुरू किया था और सबसे बेस्ट पार्ट है कि यहाँ अगर खराब इंग्लिश बोलो तो कोई जज नहीं करता, बस गलतियाँ सुधार दी जाती हैं। [Not at all, I started for just ₹1 and the best part is that if you speak bad English here, no one judges you, they just correct your mistakes.] Speaker A: अरे वाह, फिर तो सब लोगों को ये ऐप यूज़ करना चाहिए। [Oh wow, then everyone should use this app.] Speaker B: बिल्कुल! [Absolutely!] Voiceover: Download MySivi app now.
on_screen_text: AAP [You] KAMA [Earn] AFTER SELLING ALL THIS IT WILL BE AROUND 10,000 TOH MAHINE KITNA... 3 [Then monthly how much... 3] WELL NOT EXACTLY BUT I DO GOOD FOR MYSELF TOH [Then] ENGLISH SEEKHNE KE LIYE PRACTICE KARNI HOTI HAI [To learn English you have to practice] YOUTUBE PE PRACTICE KAISE KARUNGA? [How will I practice on YouTube?] BAAT TOH SAHI HAI [That is true] PHIR KAHAN SE SEEKHI? [Then where did you learn it from?] EK APP HAI [There is an app] MySivi USME EK AI TEACHER HAI JISKE SAATH MAIN PRACTICE KARKE ENGLISH SEEKHTA HOON [In which there is an AI teacher with whom I practice and learn English] PAR YE APP TOH MAHANGA HOGA NA? [But this app must be expensive, right?] BILKUL NAHI [Not at all] MAINE BAS ₹1 MEIN SHURU KIYA THA [I started for just ₹1] AUR SABSE BEST PART HAI KI YAHAN AGAR KHARAB ENGLISH BOLO TOH KOI JUDGE NAHI KARTA [And the best part is if you speak bad English here, no one judges you] BAS GALTIYAN SUDHAR DI JAATI HAIN [Just mistakes are corrected] ARRE WAH [Oh wow] PHIR TOH SAB LOGON KO YE APP USE KARNA CHAHIYE [Then everyone should use this app] BILKUL! [Absolutely!] MySivi English speaking app, Install Now
summary: A young man is impressed by a street vendor's fluent English. The vendor reveals he practices with an AI teacher on the MySivi app, which is affordable and offers judgment-free corrections. The ad ends with a call to download the app.
